sentences.text: Little Hans asked, 'Do you really think I will?'
The Miller answered, 'I am sure you will.'
He said, 'Now you fixed the roof, go home and rest, because I need you to take my sheep to the mountain tomorrow.'
Hans was afraid to say no, so the next morning he took the sheep to the mountain.
